accommodations.text: Seat with a clear line of sight to the face of the speaker.

accommodations.text: Allow a four-function calculator on non-calculation-skill tasks.

accommodations.text: Do not require unplanned oral responses in front of the class.

goals.text: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Begins a task within two minutes in 1 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Layla will independently report FM system problems to the teacher in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Emma will define grade-level academic vocabulary with 80% accuracy.
